prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Pioglitazone 15mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.8 kg; Height 166.6 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 174mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 176mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.3kg; 9 months ago 68.8kg; 6 months ago 69.2kg; 3 months ago 66.7kg; current 70.8kg), Height (12 months ago 166.6cm; 9 months ago 166.6cm; 6 months ago 166.6cm; 3 months ago 166.6cm; current 166.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 39U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 39U/L; 3 months ago 41U/L; current 44U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 32U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 269mg/g; 9 months ago 318mg/g; 6 months ago 301mg/g; 3 months ago 194mg/g; current 273mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 141mg/dL; 9 months ago 125mg/dL; 6 months ago 130mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
